message:
So the other night, we had a surprise blackout. I was in the middle of binge-watching my favorite show when suddenly—poof! Darkness. My heart raced for a moment, but then I remembered my trusty flashlight and power bank. Just as I was setting up my little lantern, my friend Sarah texted me in a panic, convinced the world was ending. I couldn't help but chuckle. I reassured her I had everything under control: snacks, phone charged, cozy blankets ready. It’s funny how some people turn into drama queens during outages, while others just roll with it. 

After a few minutes of chatting and some laughter over our very different reactions, we settled down for a game of cards by lantern light. It turned out to be a lovely evening! 

It’s moments like these that remind me how important it is to be prepared. Having the right supplies on hand can turn a potential hassle into a fun night in. 

Anyone else have a friend who panics like Sarah? What’s your go-to comfort activity during a blackout?
